propositions: 33 remediation-eligible reviews produced zero novelty drops, ambiguously indicating either a healthy precision-first scorer or a silently failing one.
The scorer's fail-safe returns zero drops on error, masking a potential defect.
The offline spec check `rebar prompt eval plan-review-novelty` validates only the spec and makes no model calls or per-case verdicts.
A live eval run via run_eval() must be executed with the [eval] extra and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to obtain per-case scores and verdicts.
The 33 eligible-but-zero-drop reviews must be re-examined to conclude whether the scorer discriminates correctly or is defective, citing concrete sidecar examples.
If the scorer is defective a linked bug ticket is filed via discovered_from; if healthy no bug is filed.
